findings.evidence: `rg` shows `addCircleMulEquivInt` at lines 151-157 with hypotheses `[PreconnectedSpace 𝕜] [TotallyDisconnectedSpace (zmultiples p)] (hp : ¬ IsOfFinAddOrder p)`, while the docstring calls `(↑)` a covering.
findings.fix: Either weaken the wording to “the deck transformation group of the quotient map” or add/document the missing covering hypotheses if the declaration is intended specifically for the covering case.
findings.issue: The docstring for `addCircleMulEquivInt` says this computes the deck group of the covering `(↑) : 𝕜 → AddCircle p`, but the theorem only assumes `[TotallyDisconnectedSpace (zmultiples p)]` and `¬ IsOfFinAddOrder p`; it does not assume the period subgroup is discrete or that `AddCircle.isCoveringMap_coe` applies.

summary: The added documentation mostly exists, but one public theorem docstring overclaims the hypotheses by calling the quotient map a covering without carrying a covering/discreteness assumption.
